_comment: Reversal-order staging, designed from this demo's own needs: a long, clearly-readable eastward cruise leg (about four seconds at pace before anything happens), then a sharp (~130 deg) order back to the north-west with open ground for the come-about arc and the new march leg. A lone 24-horse cavalry (the issue's own regiment size -- the wide anisotropic cavalry grid is where the wedge was found) starts low-west at (420, 700), marches east toward (1300, 700), and at t240 is ordered back to (380, 460). The response/reform hold now doubles as the brake leg of the turn (the momentum exemption is directional -- a held march that reverses the current travel bleeds speed at the brake rate instead of carrying it), and the hold's centre-pivot paces to the corner man, so the column brakes, comes about at a bounded rate, and steps off on the new heading in good order. Before, the block kept full pace into the turn, its bodies compressed into genuine overlap while the unpaced pivot swung their slots underneath them, and it carried ~60 wu past the turn point before recovering -- next to a routed enemy this read as a unit compressing and drifting toward the router with no order to do so. The unit explicitly overrides reform_before_move back to true -- Cavalry's own type default is now false (per-type spawn defaults), which would skip the reform hold entirely and reproduce exactly the pre-fix broken-looking behavior this demo exists to contrast against; the override isolates the reform-before-move mechanic itself from Cavalry's own default. The field is declared flat (empty terrain) so pathfinding cannot shape the arc. Sampled ticks pin the story beats (spawn, the cruise, the braked hold, the late paced turn, the settled new march); the mid-turn window is deliberately NOT sampled -- while the wide cavalry grid comes about, its flank bodies track their sweeping slots with zero gait margin and compress transiently (nnd bottoming a few wu), the same known, separately tracked formed-turn deformation family a steady advance already shows, which this staging cannot avoid exercising.
